work_unit: scripts/studio-precheck.sh — bare except + shell-interpolated path in python -c (SCRIPTS-L02)
situation: audit-2026-07-03-012 finding SCRIPTS-L02 (priority 4, pending): studio-precheck.sh L24 and L48 use bare `except:` clauses around json.load, which swallow IOError, KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and MemoryError alongside the intended ValueError/KeyError. Same file also uses `$CAL_FILE`/`$STATUS_FILE` bash-interpolated into python -c source strings (same anti-pattern as SCRIPTS-L01 fixed in case-2026-07-03-074). Precheck runs every autonomous heartbeat; a stuck keyboard-interrupt or IO error would silently report proceed/skip with wrong semantics.
action: Narrow both except clauses to `(ValueError, KeyError, TypeError)` (covers malformed JSON, missing keys, and type mismatches from .get() chains). Simultaneously switch to sys.argv[1] form for path passing, mirroring verify-pattern.sh convention post-L01 fix. Two edits, single file.
outcome_evidence: Worktree opt-scripts-shift-1783078267 created (direction-shift triggered by public-interface touch), commit pushed to origin/auto/opt-scripts-shift-1783078267. Worktree copy of scripts/studio-precheck.sh verified: L22 uses open(sys.argv[1]) with except (ValueError, KeyError, TypeError); L46 same. Smoke test against /nonexistent path exits cleanly at gate-1 (skip:no-prompt-file) with no python syntax errors. Main copy reverted by linter as expected; fix lives only in worktree awaiting merge.
next_suggestion: 派生 fix #3: SCRIPTS-L03 (autonomous-loop.sh PROMPT single-quote fragility)
派生 fix #4: SCRIPTS-L04 (distill-patterns.py load_json_robust bare Exception catch)
人工 review opt-scripts-shift-1783078267（含 SCRIPTS-L02），merge 后 derived_fixes SCRIPTS-L02 status→merged

audit_findings.finding: Bare except: clause swallows IOError/KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit/MemoryError alongside intended ValueError/KeyError. Silent miscalibration on disk/permission failures.
audit_findings.remediation: Narrow to except (ValueError, KeyError, TypeError). Pass path via sys.argv[1] instead of $CAL_FILE interpolation.

audit_findings.finding: Same bare except: pattern on autoAdvance check. IOError on status.json read masked as 'true', potentially advancing when user intended pause.
audit_findings.remediation: Narrow to except (ValueError, KeyError, TypeError). Pass path via sys.argv[1].
